content.content:
1	\paragraph{1996 B--2 \textnormal{[\texttt{asymptotic, integral-inequality}]}}
2	Show that for every positive integer $n$,
3	\[
4	\left( \frac{2n-1}{e} \right)^{\frac{2n-1}{2}} < 1 \cdot 3 \cdot 5
5	\cdots (2n-1) < \left( \frac{2n+1}{e} \right)^{\frac{2n+1}{2}}.
6	\]
7

file.content:
\paragraph{1996 B--2 \textnormal{[\texttt{asymptotic, integral-inequality}]}}
Show that for every positive integer $n$,
\[
\left( \frac{2n-1}{e} \right)^{\frac{2n-1}{2}} < 1 \cdot 3 \cdot 5
\cdots (2n-1) < \left( \frac{2n+1}{e} \right)^{\frac{2n+1}{2}}.
\]

input.command: ls -la && echo "---" && cat lakefile* 2>/dev/null | head -50 && echo "--- toolchain ---" && cat lean-toolchain 2>/dev/null

input.content:
import Mathlib

open Finset

noncomputable def Fb (m : ℕ) : ℝ := (2*(m:ℝ) - 1)/2 * (Real.log (2*(m:ℝ) - 1) - 1)

noncomputable def Sb (m : ℕ) : ℝ := ∑ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 m, Real.log (2*(i:ℝ) - 1)

lemma Sb_succ (m : ℕ) : Sb (m+1) = Sb m + Real.log (2*(m:ℝ) + 1) := by
  unfold Sb
  rw [Finset.sum_Icc_succ_top (by omega : 1 ≤ m+1)]
  have h : (2*((m+1:ℕ):ℝ) - 1) = 2*(m:ℝ) + 1 := by push_cast; ring
  rw [h]

lemma Fb_step (m : ℕ) :
    Fb (m+1) - Fb m
      = (2*(m:ℝ)+1)/2 * Real.log (2*(m:ℝ)+1)
        - (2*(m:ℝ)-1)/2 * Real.log (2*(m:ℝ)-1) - 1 := by
  unfold Fb
  push_cast
  rw [show (2*((m:ℝ)+1) - 1) = 2*(m:ℝ)+1 from by ring]
  ring

-- generic real step inequalities (calculus-free, via log x < x - 1)
lemma logbound (x : ℝ) (hx : 0 < x) :
    Real.log x < (x+2)/2 * Real.log (x+2) - x/2 * Real.log x - 1
    ∧ (x+2)/2 * Real.log (x+2) - x/2 * Real.log x - 1 < Real.log (x+2) := by
  have hx2 : (0:ℝ) < x + 2 := by linarith
  constructor
  · -- lower: log x < ...
    have ht0 : 0 < x/(x+2) := div_pos hx hx2
    have htne : x/(x+2) ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      have := (div_eq_one_iff_eq (ne_of_gt hx2)).mp h
      linarith
    have hkey : Real.log (x/(x+2)) < x/(x+2) - 1 :=
      Real.log_lt_sub_one_of_pos ht0 htne
    rw [Real.log_div (ne_of_gt hx) (ne_of_gt hx2)] at hkey
    -- hkey : log x - log (x+2) < x/(x+2) - 1
    have hmul : (Real.log x - Real.log (x+2)) * (x+2) < (x/(x+2) - 1) * (x+2) :=
      mul_lt_mul_of_pos_right hkey hx2
    have hval : (x/(x+2) - 1) * (x+2) = -2 := by
      field_simp
    rw [hval] at hmul
    nlinarith [hmul]
  · -- upper: ... < log (x+2)
    have ht0 : 0 < (x+2)/x := div_pos hx2 hx
    have htne : (x+2)/x ≠ 1 := by
      intro h
      have := (div_eq_one_iff_eq (ne_of_gt hx)).mp h
      linarith
    have hkey : Real.log ((x+2)/x) < (x+2)/x - 1 :=
      Real.log_lt_sub_one_of_pos ht0 htne
    rw [Real.log_div (ne_of_gt hx2) (ne_of_gt hx)] at hkey
    -- hkey : log (x+2) - log x < (x+2)/x - 1
    have hmul : (Real.log (x+2) - Real.log x) * x < ((x+2)/x - 1) * x :=
      mul_lt_mul_of_pos_right hkey hx
    have hval : ((x+2)/x - 1) * x = 2 := by
      field_simp
    rw [hval] at hmul
    nlinarith [hmul]

lemma lowerB : ∀ m, Fb (m+1) < Sb (m+1) := by
  intro m
  induction m with
  | zero =>
      have hS1 : Sb 1 = 0 := by
        simp [Sb, Finset.Icc_self, Finset.sum_singleton]
      have hF1 : Fb 1 = -1/2 := by
        unfold Fb; norm_num
      rw [show (0:ℕ)+1 = 1 from rfl, hF1, hS1]; norm_num
  | succ k ih =>
      have hrec : Sb (k+1+1) = Sb (k+1) + Real.log (2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) + 1) := Sb_succ (k+1)
      have hstepeq := Fb_step (k+1)
      have hb := (logbound (2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ)-1) (by
        have : (0:ℝ) ≤ ((k:ℕ):ℝ) := Nat.cast_nonneg k
        push_cast; linarith)).2
      -- hb : (x+2)/2*log(x+2) - x/2*log x - 1 < log(x+2), x = 2(k+1)-1
      have e1 : (2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ)-1) + 2 = 2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ)+1 := by ring
      rw [e1] at hb
      -- now hb matches Fb_step (k+1) RHS and Sb_succ added term
      have hstep : Fb (k+1+1) - Fb (k+1) < Real.log (2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ)+1) := by
        rw [hstepeq]; linarith [hb]
      linarith [ih, hrec, hstep]

lemma upperB : ∀ m, Sb (m+1) < Fb (m+2) := by
  intro m
  induction m with
  | zero =>
      have hS1 : Sb 1 = 0 := by
        simp [Sb, Finset.Icc_self, Finset.sum_singleton]
      have hexp : Real.exp 1 < 3 :=
        lt_trans Real.exp_one_lt_d9 (by norm_num)
      have hlog3 : (1:ℝ) < Real.log 3 :=
        (Real.lt_log_iff_exp_lt (by norm_num)).mpr hexp
      have hF2 : Fb 2 = 3/2 * (Real.log 3 - 1) := by
        unfold Fb; norm_num
      rw [show (0:ℕ)+1 = 1 from rfl, hS1, hF2]
      nlinarith [hlog3]
  | succ k ih =>
      have hrec : Sb (k+1+1) = Sb (k+1) + Real.log (2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) + 1) := Sb_succ (k+1)
      have hstepeq := Fb_step (k+2)
      have ha := (logbound (2*((k+2:ℕ):ℝ)-1) (by
        have : (0:ℝ) ≤ ((k:ℕ):ℝ) := Nat.cast_nonneg k
        push_cast; linarith)).1
      have e1 : (2*((k+2:ℕ):ℝ)-1) + 2 = 2*((k+2:ℕ):ℝ)+1 := by ring
      rw [e1] at ha
      -- ha : log(2(k+2)-1) < (2(k+2)+1)/2*log(...) - (2(k+2)-1)/2*log(...) - 1
      have hcast : (2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) + 1) = 2*((k+2:ℕ):ℝ) - 1 := by push_cast; ring
      rw [hcast] at hrec
      have hstep : Real.log (2*((k+2:ℕ):ℝ)-1) < Fb (k+2+1) - Fb (k+2) := by
        rw [hstepeq]; linarith [ha]
      have hgoal : Sb (k+1+1) < Fb (k+1+2) := by
        have e2 : k+1+2 = k+2+1 := by omega
        rw [e2]
        linarith [ih, hrec, hstep]
      exact hgoal

theorem putnam_1996_b2 (n : ℕ) (hn : 0 < n) :
    ((2*(n:ℝ) - 1)/Real.exp 1) ^ ((2*(n:ℝ) - 1)/2)
      < ∏ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 n, (2*(i:ℝ) - 1)
    ∧ (∏ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 n, (2*(i:ℝ) - 1))
      < ((2*(n:ℝ) + 1)/Real.exp 1) ^ ((2*(n:ℝ) + 1)/2) := by
  obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ : ∃ k, n = k+1 := ⟨n-1, by omega⟩
  -- positivity of the product factors
  have hfpos : ∀ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (k+1), (0:ℝ) < 2*(i:ℝ) - 1 := by
    intro i hi
    rw [Finset.mem_Icc] at hi
    have : (1:ℝ) ≤ (i:ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hi.1
    linarith
  have hP : (0:ℝ) < ∏ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (k+1), (2*(i:ℝ) - 1) :=
    Finset.prod_pos hfpos
  have hPlog : Real.log (∏ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (k+1), (2*(i:ℝ) - 1)) = Sb (k+1) := by
    unfold Sb
    rw [Real.log_prod _ _ (fun i hi => (hfpos i hi).ne')]
  -- bases positive
  have hnum1 : (0:ℝ) < 2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) - 1 := by
    have : (1:ℝ) ≤ ((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr (Nat.succ_ne_zero k)
    linarith
  have hnum2 : (0:ℝ) < 2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) + 1 := by positivity
  have hb1 : (0:ℝ) < (2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) - 1)/Real.exp 1 := div_pos hnum1 (Real.exp_pos 1)
  have hb2 : (0:ℝ) < (2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) + 1)/Real.exp 1 := div_pos hnum2 (Real.exp_pos 1)
  -- logs of the power expressions
  have hA : Real.log (((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) - 1)/Real.exp 1) ^ ((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) - 1)/2))
      = Fb (k+1) := by
    rw [Real.log_rpow hb1, Real.log_div (ne_of_gt hnum1) (Real.exp_ne_zero 1), Real.log_exp]
    unfold Fb
    ring
  have hC : Real.log (((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) + 1)/Real.exp 1) ^ ((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) + 1)/2))
      = Fb (k+2) := by
    rw [Real.log_rpow hb2, Real.log_div (ne_of_gt hnum2) (Real.exp_ne_zero 1), Real.log_exp]
    unfold Fb
    rw [show (2*((k+2:ℕ):ℝ) - 1) = 2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) + 1 from by push_cast; ring]
    ring
  have hApos : (0:ℝ) < ((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) - 1)/Real.exp 1) ^ ((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) - 1)/2) :=
    Real.rpow_pos_of_pos hb1 _
  have hCpos : (0:ℝ) < ((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) + 1)/Real.exp 1) ^ ((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) + 1)/2) :=
    Real.rpow_pos_of_pos hb2 _
  constructor
  · -- left inequality
    have hlt : Real.log (((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) - 1)/Real.exp 1) ^ ((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) - 1)/2))
        < Real.log (∏ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (k+1), (2*(i:ℝ) - 1)) := by
      rw [hA, hPlog]; exact lowerB k
    calc ((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) - 1)/Real.exp 1) ^ ((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) - 1)/2)
        = Real.exp (Real.log (((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) - 1)/Real.exp 1) ^ ((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) - 1)/2))) :=
          (Real.exp_log hApos).symm
      _ < Real.exp (Real.log (∏ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (k+1), (2*(i:ℝ) - 1))) :=
          Real.exp_lt_exp.mpr hlt
      _ = ∏ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (k+1), (2*(i:ℝ) - 1) := Real.exp_log hP
  · -- right inequality
    have hlt : Real.log (∏ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (k+1), (2*(i:ℝ) - 1))
        < Real.log (((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) + 1)/Real.exp 1) ^ ((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) + 1)/2)) := by
      rw [hPlog, hC]; exact upperB k
    calc (∏ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (k+1), (2*(i:ℝ) - 1))
        = Real.exp (Real.log (∏ i ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (k+1), (2*(i:ℝ) - 1))) :=
          (Real.exp_log hP).symm
      _ < Real.exp (Real.log (((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) + 1)/Real.exp 1) ^ ((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) + 1)/2))) :=
          Real.exp_lt_exp.mpr hlt
      _ = ((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) + 1)/Real.exp 1) ^ ((2*((k+1:ℕ):ℝ) + 1)/2) := Real.exp_log hCpos

import Mathlib

-- Write the formalized theorem statement and a complete proof here.
-- Do not leave any `sorry`. The file must compile (`lake build`) clean.
